items.title: ‘Cheapest Spot SOL ETF ever!’ – Will Morgan Stanley’s debut spur the altcoin?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's entry into the SOL ETF market with low fees could enhance SOL's visibility and attract institutional investment.

items.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of low-fee ETH and SOL ETFs by Morgan Stanley may increase competition and drive demand for SOL within the investment community.

items.title: The 5 Largest Publicly Traded Solana Treasury Firms
items.whyYouShouldCare: Identifying the largest publicly traded firms holding Solana treasuries highlights the growing institutional interest and potential liquidity in the SOL ecosystem.
